tools.name: Assorted Tools
tools.description: Wrenches, spanners, screwdrivers; can be used as improvised tools.

tools.name: Automed (x5)
tools.description: Nanotech pills granting advantage on Body Saves vs. disease, poison, and healing attempts.

tools.name: Battery (High Power)
tools.description: Heavy-duty battery for high-power devices; recharges in 1h (power) or 6h (solar).

tools.name: Binoculars
tools.description: 20x magnification; optional night vision or thermal upgrades.

tools.name: Bioscanner
tools.description: Long-range life-sign detector; blocked by some materials.

tools.name: Body Cam
tools.description: Wearable camera streaming to a control center; optional night/thermal upgrades.

tools.name: Chemlight (x5)
tools.description: Small glowsticks providing dim 1m illumination.

tools.name: Crowbar
tools.description: Grants advantage on Strength checks for forcing or lifting.

tools.name: Cybernetic Diagnostic Scanner
tools.description: Scans androids/cybernetics for physical or mental issues.

tools.name: Electronic Tool Set
tools.description: Detailed repair tools for electronics.

tools.name: Emergency Beacon
tools.description: Flare + loud beacon + radio distress call; jammer-blockable.

tools.name: Exoloader
tools.description: Mechanical exoskeleton for lifting up to 5000kg; battery powered.

tools.name: Explosives & Detonator
tools.description: Charge capable of breaching airlocks; detonator works at Long Range.

tools.name: First Aid Kit
tools.description: Dressings and treatments for minor injuries.

tools.name: Flashlight
tools.description: Handheld or mounted; illuminates 10m.

tools.name: Foldable Stretcher
tools.description: Portable stretcher for safe patient transport.

tools.name: Geiger Counter
tools.description: Detects and displays radiation levels.

tools.name: Heads-Up Display (HUD)
tools.description: Displays body-cam feeds and smart-link weapon data.

tools.name: Infrared Goggles
tools.description: Detects heat signatures; optional night vision upgrade.

tools.name: Jetpack
tools.description: Flight up to 100m high / 100kmh for 2 hours; fuel refill 200cr.

tools.name: Lockpick Set
tools.description: Tools for hacking basic airlocks and electronic doors.

tools.name: Long-range Comms
tools.description: Surface-to-ship communication device.

tools.name: Mag-boots
tools.description: Magnetic boots for walking on ship exteriors or metal surfaces.

tools.name: Medscanner
tools.description: Scans bodies for disease or abnormalities; may require lab analysis.

tools.name: MoHab Unit
tools.description: Tent, stove, rucksack, compass, sleeping bag.

tools.name: MRE (x7)
tools.description: One-day field ration pack.

tools.name: Mylar Blanket
tools.description: Heat-reflective emergency blanket.

tools.name: Oxygen Tank
tools.description: Provides 12h oxygen (4h under stress) when attached to vaccsuit.

tools.name: Paracord (50m)
tools.description: Lightweight nylon rope.

tools.name: Patch Kit (x3)
tools.description: Repairs vaccsuit punctures; patched suits have AP 1.

tools.name: Personal Locator
tools.description: Allows remote tracking of wearer.

tools.name: Pet (Organic)
tools.description: Organic pet; rare/larger pets cost 2d10× base cost.

tools.name: Pet (Synthetic)
tools.description: Synthetic pet; rare/larger models cost 2d10× base cost.

tools.name: Portable Computer Terminal
tools.description: Portable computer for hacking and general tasks.

tools.name: Radiation Pills (x5)
tools.description: Reduce radiation level temporarily.

tools.name: Radio Jammer
tools.description: Blocks radio signals within 100km.

tools.name: Rebreather
tools.description: Filters toxic air or allows 20 minutes underwater breathing.

tools.name: Rucksack
tools.description: Large waterproof backpack.

tools.name: Salvage Drone
tools.description: Remote drone with modular equipment slots; 2h battery.

tools.name: Sample Collection Kit
tools.description: Collects biological samples for analysis.

tools.name: Short-range Comms
tools.description: Short-range communication; jammer-blockable.

tools.name: Smart-link Add-On
tools.description: Remote viewing/operation of ranged weapons; +5 damage.

tools.name: Stimpak
tools.description: Reduces stress, restores health, boosts rolls; overdose risk.

tools.name: Water Filtration Device
tools.description: Filters 4L of water per hour.
